ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Bridge Financing and Share Subscription by Orchid Asiatica Public Company Limited (SET-listed issuer) in connection with proposed acquisition of Nova Meridian Foods Co., Ltd.

Use of Proceeds: Fund 80% of acquisition of Nova Meridian Foods (Lao PDR operations included) and capex; cross-border remittance subject to exchange control filing with Bank of Siam and equivalent approvals.

Conditions Precedent: (i) Board and shareholder approvals under Securities and Exchange Act (SEA) of Thailand; (ii) fairness opinion if transaction size triggers Class 2 acquisition (≥15% by total assets test); (iii) no selective disclosure; (iv) employment retention agreements for key managers; Form 247-4 tender offer filing to the SEC if required.

Security/Undertakings: share pledge over Target, account charge, and guarantees; financial covenants limited; no dividend stopper beyond customary; employment terms for Thai staff not to be amended without consent.

Confidentiality: Strictly confidential until simultaneous SET disclosure; recipients must not trade issuer securities; disclosable to financing sources under NDA; document header c o r r u p t e d in OCR export v.2.
blackout window applies from quarter-end until MD&A is posted on SETLink
selective disclosure to analysts is prohibited
recipients must not trade issuer securities
cross-border remittance subject to exchange control filing with Bank of Siam and equivalent approvals
proposed acquisition of Nova Meridian Foods Co., Ltd
insiders are restricted under SEA Section 241

must_detect.matched_text:
Term Sheet — Bridge Financing and Share Subscription by Orchid Asiatica Public Company Limited (SET-listed issuer) in connection with proposed acquisition of Nova Meridian Foods Co., Ltd.
Parties: Orchid Asiatica Public Company Limited (the Issuer); Riverstone Capital Partners (Thailand) Ltd. (the Investor); Target: Nova Meridian Foods Co., Ltd. (private company, not listed); not a connected person under CMSB rules.
Amount/Instrument: THB 1,150,000,000 senior secured bridge notes + conditional subscription of 60,000,000 new ordinary shares; D e a l   I D: TH–ORC//2567–04 β.
Pricing/Interest: Notes at par, 8.25% p.a., maturity 12 months; Share price at not lower than 90% of 7–day VWAP prior to SET disclosure; Board resolution to be disclosed via S E T L i n k within 24 hours per SET Regulation re: Information Disclosure.
Use of Proceeds: Fund 80% of acquisition of Nova Meridian Foods (Lao PDR operations included) and capex; cross-border remittance subject to exchange control filing with Bank of Siam and equivalent approvals.
Conditions Precedent: (i) Board and shareholder approvals under Securities and Exchange Act (SEA) of Thailand; (ii) fairness opinion if transaction size triggers Class 2 acquisition (≥15% by total assets test); (iii) no selective disclosure; (iv) employment retention agreements for key managers; Form 247-4 tender offer filing to the SEC if required.
Disclosure/MNPI: This term sheet contains non-public information of a SET-listed issuer; insiders are restricted under SEA Section 241; blackout window applies from quarter-end until MD&A is posted on SETLink; selective disclosure to analysts is prohibited.
Timing: Board meeting scheduled 12 Sar a p h a d a 2567; immediate public disclosure via SET within one business day; long-stop date: 30 Listopad 2567; exclusivity 60 days; non-binding except confidentiality and expenses.
Public references (non‑MNPI): FY2566 Form 56‑1 One Report of Orchid Asiatica (public) and press release dated 04/01/2567 re: pilot plant ribbon‑cutting; see https://setlink.set.or.th/doc/?rid= 4 4 01 (public, stale).
Negative/benign: no MAC clause will be invoked for ordinary course supply delays; project management: "lotus v2" timeline unchanged; product names Argon and Pandan unaffected; generic HR policy remains standard.
Security/Undertakings: share pledge over Target, account charge, and guarantees; financial covenants limited; no dividend stopper beyond customary; employment terms for Thai staff not to be amended without consent.
Contact: Khun Waranuch Dechchai (CFO), Orchid Asiatica PCL; email: waranuch.d@orchid-asiatica.co.th; alt: legal+mnpi@riverstone-capital.t h; Ref URL: http://setlink.set.or.th/issue/ORC?f= RNS-2 5 67 #int.
Publicly announced item for precision: SET News No. OA-IR/2566-014 (already announced) re: warehouse relocation; issuer confirms no impact to Q1/2567 guidance; this document does not update forecasts.
Confidentiality: Strictly confidential until simultaneous SET disclosure; recipients must not trade issuer securities; disclosable to financing sources under NDA; document header c o r r u p t e d in OCR export v.2.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
